metadata.title: CupOracle · World Cup AI Predictions
metadata.description: Multi-model LLM predictions for FIFA World Cup 2026 — win/draw/loss probabilities and score forecasts from group stage to the final.

nav.disclaimer: Predictions are for research and entertainment only. Not betting advice.

footer.about: CupOracle aggregates predictions from multiple large language models to provide probabilistic match outcomes and score references for football fans.
footer.disclaimer: ⚠️ Predictions are for research and entertainment only. Not betting advice.

hero.subtitle: Aggregated judgments from leading LLMs — win/draw/loss probabilities, most likely scores, and key factors for every match from the group stage to the final.

upcoming.title: Upcoming · {count} tomorrow
upcoming.subtitle: Multi-model AI predictions are ready for tomorrow's matches.

features.title: More than predictions —
features.subtitle: Combine LLM probability judgments with structured match data for insights you can read, compare, and verify.

multiModel.title: Parallel multi-model predictions
multiModel.desc: MiMo, DeepSeek, GLM, and MiniMax generate judgments in parallel, then aggregate via consensus.

dataDriven.title: Data-driven explanations
dataDriven.desc: Every conclusion comes with recent form, H2H history, injuries, and venue factors — traceable probabilities.

fullTournament.title: Full tournament tracking
fullTournament.desc: Status, xG, and confidence sync in real time — group stage through the final in one place.

cta.subtitle: Browse full predictions, key factors, and multi-model comparisons for every match.

matches.title: All
matches.subtitle: Every match from the group stage to the final. Filter by status, group, or search teams.
matches.metaDescription: Browse AI predictions and status for all 2026 World Cup matches.

matchDetail.noPrediction: No prediction yet — not generated or match finished
matchDetail.contextError: Failed to load context. Please try again.
matchDetail.hashMismatch: · Data may have changed since prediction

qualification.pageSubtitle: Qualification status and scenarios. Top 2 from each group advance directly; the best 8 third-placed teams also progress.
qualification.thirdPlaceSubtitle: All 12 group thirds ranked by points, goal difference, goals scored — top {spots} advance
qualification.thirdPlaceLegend: Green rows mark the current qualifying zone (top {spots}). Ranks may shift while group games remain.
qualification.overallSubtitle: All 48 teams ranked globally by group-stage points, goal difference, and goals scored
qualification.overallLegend: Green rows are confirmed qualifiers (top 2 per group or best third); group pos. is current rank within each group
qualification.metaDescription: 2026 World Cup group stage qualification scenarios.

privacy.metaDescription: CupOracle privacy policy — how we collect and use data, including Google AdSense and cookies.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
